steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Check sudo capabilities using 'sudo -l' looking for NOPASSWD entries
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for linux privesc methodology
steps.expected_output: List of commands executable with sudo including passwordless escalation opportunities

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Search for SUID binaries across filesystem with find command
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Complete list of setuid binaries that could be exploited for escalation

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Cross-reference discovered SUID binaries against GTFOBins database for exploits
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Mapped exploitable SUID binaries with corresponding GTFOBins exploitation methods

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Check crontab and system cron directories for scheduled tasks with escalation potential
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Discovered cron jobs and their associated files with writable permissions

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Identify world-writable files and directories that could enable privilege escalation
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: List of writable files in critical system directories

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Run LinPEAS script for automated privilege escalation enumeration
steps.expected_output: Comprehensive vulnerability assessment including kernel exploits and misconfigurations

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: As last resort, check kernel version against known exploits using searchsploit
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Identified kernel vulnerabilities with proof-of-concept exploits available
